$comment: Reference case for stokes_drag (F = 6 * pi * mu * radius * velocity). Single coefficient (mu) with canonical air-at-20C viscosity. Tolerance is percent-relative rather than absolute because mu is tiny (1.81e-5).
notes: Two-input product-sweep (60 points). `relative_tolerance` style used instead of absolute because mu is O(1e-5); ±5 % is a realistic regression bound for this scale.
